checks.description: Guard against assuming fixed latency for edge cases; output must become stable after inputs settle without a cycle count requirement.
checks.pass_condition: Output c stabilizes after the input stimulus settles and does not rely on a specific number of clock cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When the edge case stimulus (zero-like, one-like, or boundary patterns) is applied.

checks.description: c must equal the combinational sum of a and b for the driven inputs, respecting N‑bit wrap‑around.
checks.pass_condition: After inputs a and b settle, c matches (a + b) modulo 2^N.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic stimulus drives a and b with a representative legal pattern.
